name: Anna's Archive MCP
what_it_does: MCP server and CLI tool for searching and downloading books and articles from Anna's Archive, supporting title/author/topic search and DOI-based article retrieval.
use_cases: Search for books by title, author, or topic via AI assistant
Search for academic articles by DOI or keywords
Build research workflows with AI-assisted document discovery
not_for: Accessing copyrighted content without proper licensing
best_when: You want an AI assistant to help search and retrieve documents from Anna's Archive for research purposes.
avoid_when: You need guaranteed content availability (mirrors can go offline), need access to paywalled journals through institutional access, or have concerns about the legal status of content on the platform.

auth.notes: Requires ANNAS_SECRET_KEY env var. API key is obtained by making a donation to Anna's Archive, which grants JSON API access.

pricing.paid_tiers: Donation to Anna's Archive required for API access (amount not specified).
pricing.notes: The MCP server code is open source. API access requires a donation to Anna's Archive. The donation amount for API access is not publicly documented.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: No documentation on error handling. Unclear what happens when mirrors are down or downloads fail.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Search operations are read-only. Downloads by MD5/DOI are deterministic and repeatable.
known_agent_gotchas: Mirror availability is unreliable - annas-archive.org is inactive, others may change
ANNAS_DOWNLOAD_PATH must be pre-configured or downloads silently fail or go to unexpected locations
Legal ambiguity around content - agents should not auto-download without user confirmation
API key acquisition requires donation with no documented minimum amount
Only 4 tools available - limited to search and download, no metadata enrichment or citation formatting
Go binary distribution means no pip/npm install - requires manual binary placement
